title: eryngium duriaei subsp. juresianum
intro: Eryngium duriaei subsp. juresianum, also known as a subspecies of the Eryngium duriaei plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Eryngium duriaei subsp. juresianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to the study, eryngium duriaei subsp. juresianum, as part of the Eryngium spp., has been found to have beneficial properties in treating diabetes, dyslipidemia, and other related conditions due to its bioactive components, such as flavonoids, tannins, phenolic acids, terpenes, sesquiterpenes, and saponins.
